description: A peaceful glade filled with soft sunlight. A gentle stream of liquid polish flows nearby. To the north, the forest clearing returns.

wall.description: Dense, thorny laces protect this glade.

exit_north.description: The trail leads north back to the clearing.

exit_east.description: A rusted iron gate stands here, leading back to the sunny meadow.

npc_bob.description: Bob the Boot sits by the stream, cleaning his laces.

dialogue.text: "A traveler! Have you seen Sue? She's always in such a rush."
"This stream... it's the best polish in all of Sentientworldia."
